name: Pre-existing knee issue worsened by work slip, covered?

mainEntity.name: Pre-existing knee issue worsened by work slip, covered?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, covers aggravation; get doctor to link worsening to fall.
acceptedAnswer.description: Workers' comp covers aggravation of pre-existing conditions if work incident caused worsening; prove via medical opinion[2]. Key factors: No need 'but for' test—substantial contribution suffices. Full treatment for flare-up. Avoid 'prior injury' denial traps.

description: Yes, covers aggravation; get doctor to link worsening to fall.
